'''Tol Cressa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. The Chancellor worked to restore the Republic from the devastation that was brought by the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] and [[Jedi Civil War]]. Cressa was still in [[Office of the Supreme Chancellor/Legends|office]] by [[3946 BBY]], when he organized a [[Liberation of 400100500260026|successful liberation]] of a [[400100500260026|sector]] that had [[Secession of 400100500260026|seceded]] from the Republic under the leadership of rogue [[G0-T0 infrastructure planning system]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]].

==Biography==
Tol Cressa,<ref name="EGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> a [[Gender/Legends|male]], rose to the [[Office of the Supreme Chancellor/Legends|office]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] during the era of the [[Old Sith Wars]]. In [[3963 BBY]], around the outbreak of the [[Mandalorian Wars]], Cressa had commissioned the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Raana Tey]] to a special assignment.<ref name="KotOR 12" /> During the last stages of the [[Taris Siege|battle]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], Cressa began an investigation into how the [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] gained such a quick entry into the Republic.<ref name="Invasion">"[[The Taris Holofeed: Invasion Edition]]"—[[Knights of the Old Republic 18|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 18]]</ref> [[3966 BBY/Legends|Three years before]] Cressa's investigation,<ref name="TTH: SE">{{KOTORbackups|15}}</ref> Taris was admitted into the Republic thanks to the efforts of [[Lhosan Industries]] [[Chairman/Legends|Chairman]] [[Jervo Thalien]]<ref name="Handbook">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Handbook]]''</ref> and [[Haydel Goravvus]],<ref name="KotOR CG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> who bribed other [[Senator/Legends|senators]] in order to secure admission into the Republic.<ref name="Handbook" /> After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Jimas Veltraa]] during the battle, the Chancellor overruled renaming an [[Interdictor-class cruiser|''Interdictor''-class cruiser]] after Veltraa.<ref name="Veltraa">{{KOTORbackups|13}}</ref> During the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] occupation of Taris, Cressa assigned Tey to locate and aid Goravvus,<ref name="KotOR 23" /> who became the planet's senator after Taris became a Republic world.<ref name="TTH: SE" /> Goravvus was leading the [[Taris Resistance|Tarisian resistance efforts]] against the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]].<ref name="KotOR 23" />

Following the Mandalorians' [[Battle of Duro (Mandalorian Wars)|devastation]] of the planet [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] in [[3962 BBY]], Cressa, relenting to Republic citizens' feelings, named the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]<ref name="EGtW" />—whose [[Revanchist|Jedi faction]] was operating with the [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic's forces]] under the guise of a [[Republic Mercy Corps|mercy corps]],<ref name="KotOR 49">[[Knights of the Old Republic 49|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 49]]</ref>—as the [[Supreme Commander (Republic)|commander]] of the Republic's military forces.<ref name="EGtW" /> In [[3955 BBY]], one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the [[Battle of Rakata Prime|end]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]],<ref name="KotOR CG" /> Cressa commissioned the [[Telosian Restoration Project]],<ref name="NEGtD" /> which was an effort to restore the planet [[Telos IV]] from its destruction during the Jedi Civil War.<ref name="KotOR II game">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>

During the [[Dark Wars]], a series of conflicts that included the [[Sith Triumvirate]]'s [[First Jedi Purge|assassination campaign]] against the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]],<ref name="KotOR CG" /> Cressa also authorized the [[G0-T0 infrastructure planning system]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] project in order to aid in the rebuilding of other worlds<ref name="NEGtD" /> and infrastructures<ref name="CSWE: Cressa" /> that were devastated during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]—which was between the Republic and [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun's]] [[Sith Empire (Exar Kun)/Legends|Sith Empire]]<ref name="KotOR CG" />—and the Jedi Civil War. The G0-T0 droids controlling the [[400100500260026]] territory, which consisted of sixteen planets ruled by the droids, [[Secession of 400100500260026|seceded]] from the Republic, cut off [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] communications, and blocked traffic in and out of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. In [[3946 BBY]], Cressa organized a [[Liberation of 400100500260026|successful recapture]] of those planets, which were under the control of the G0-T0 droids.<ref name="GH 84">{{TORcite|type=codex|Galactic History 84: The G0-T0 Coup}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
During the [[Mandalorian Wars]], Tol Cressa was willing to promote the Jedi Knight Revan to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the Republic's military due to the desire of the Republic's citizens. He also wished to express his disgruntlement with the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], which had taken a stance of inaction in the Mandalorian Wars.<ref name="EGtW" /> In the [[Time/Legends|time]] period after the Jedi Civil War's end, Cressa was regarded as being a legendary Chancellor.<ref name="CSWE: Cressa" />

==Behind the scenes==
The character of Tol Cressa was first mentioned in the [[Knights of the Old Republic 12|twelfth issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], with his background also expanded on in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''. However, the Chancellor was not identified until the release of the ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'', which mentioned him by his surname. He was later given an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. Cressa was given the first name "Tol" in ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'', which also expanded on his role in the Mandalorian Wars.
